gist.headline: Restoring the Flower
gist.blurb: We fixed a typo in the app showcase that accidentally hid the true creator of PollGen. @XHyperDEVX has their rightful Flower status back!
gist.summary: Corrected the GitHub owner attribution for the PollGen app in the community showcase.
gist.impact: Ensures @XHyperDEVX receives proper credit and restores their Flower tier status for contributing to the ecosystem.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee handing a glowing pink pixel flower (representing the Flower tier) to a happy little robot holding a 'PollGen' sign, symbolizing restoring credit and tier status.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot handing a glowing pink pixel flower to a happy little robot holding a sign that says 'PollGen'. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
